(;W[kd]C[IMHO, black got a better result. WL16 is gote which is the same as some of the other variations.  White lost the L13 group.  The L17 group is dead because white can snap back. K15 is double gote (i.e. gote for both players).  The J15 group is not strategically important in the resulting position. It is not known who will get the 6 point K15 gote.];B[ld]C[BM16 would be a mistake because of snapback unless it is a ko threat.];W[kd]C[SnapbackRIGHT])
